visuals.title: Redis
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Redis (Key-Value Store)</text>
  
  <!-- Database Container -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="300" height="240" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Key-Value Pairs -->
  <rect x="100" y="100" width="220" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    user:123
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="100" y="150" width="220" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    session:abc
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="100" y="200" width="220" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    cache:item
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="100" y="250" width="220" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    config:theme
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow connecting key to value -->
  <line x1="150" y1="120" x2="270" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Key Label -->
  <text x="130" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Key
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Value Label -->
  <text x="290" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Value
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Redis Logo -->
  <circle cx="360" y="80" r="15" fill="#D32F2F" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="360" y="83" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    R
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
